revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{buddhism}} '''化楽天'''（けらくてん、[[サンスクリット語|Skt]]：Nirmaannarati）は、、[[欲界]]における[[六欲天]]の第5の[[天部...'

revision.text:
{{buddhism}} '''化楽天'''（けらくてん、[[サンスクリット語|Skt]]：Nirmaannarati）は、、[[欲界]]における[[六欲天]]の第5の[[天部]]である。正しくは'''楽変化天'''（らくへんげてん）という。
== 概説 == この天に生まれたる者は、自己の対境（五境）を変化して娯楽の境とするので、楽変化天という。天人の身長は2里半で、つねに光を放ち、寿命は8000歳で人間の1日1夜とする。また男女が互いに相向かって笑えば、すなわち交媾の目的を果たし、子は男女の膝上より化生市、その大きさは人間の12歳の童子の如くであるといわれる。
== 関連項目 == *[[天部]] *[[欲界]] *[[六欲天]]
{{Buddhism stub|けらくてん}} [[Category:仏教|けらくてん]]

== 関連項目 == *[[天部]] *[[欲界]] *[[六欲天]]
{{Buddhism stub|けらくてん}} [[Category:仏教|けらくてん]]

revision.comment: 天上界の名称は仏教で普遍的に知られるため、カテゴリー先を張り替えるのではなく追加する方が望ましいでしょう

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Nirmāṇarati]][[ja:化楽天]][[ko:화락천]][[my:နိမ္မာနရတိဘုံ]][[th:นิมมานรดี]][[zh:化樂天]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1185140]]
Wikidata name: Nirmāṇarati
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1185140]]
Wikidata name: Nirmāṇarati
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Kerakuten''' (化楽天, {{lang-sa-short|Nirmāṇarati}}{{refnest|name="精選版_化楽天"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E7.B2.BE.E9.81.B8.E7.89.88.20.E6.97.A5.E6.9C.AC.E5.9B.BD.E8.AA.9E.E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E5.85.B8 "Kerakuten" - 精選版 日本国語大辞典], Shogakukan.}}, {{lang-pi-short|Nimmānarati}}) is the fifth heaven of the {{ill|six heavens of the desire realm|lt=six heavens of the desire realm|lt=Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|ja|六欲天|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|qq=}} in the [[:en:Desire realm|Desire Realm]]. It is also referred to as '''Katen''' (化天), '''Kazirakuten''' (化自楽天), '''Kazizaiten''' (化自在天), or '''Rakuhenkaten''' (楽変化天){{refnest|name="大辞林_第三版"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E6.9E.97.20.E7.AC.AC.E4.B8.89.E7.89.88 "Kerakuten" - 大辞林 第三版]}}.

== Overview ==
Beings born in this heaven transform their sensory objects (五境) into realms of pleasure. The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

== Notes ==

=== Annotations ===
{{Notelist}}
=== References ===
{{Reflist}}

== See also ==

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Kerakuten''' (化楽天, {{lang-sa-short|Nirmāṇarati}}{{refnest|name="精選版_化楽天"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E7.B2.BE.E9.81.B8.E7.89.88.20.E6.97.A5.E6.9C.AC.E5.9B.BD.E8.AA.9E.E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E5.85.B8 "Kerakuten" - 精選版 日本国語大辞典], Shogakukan.}}, {{lang-pi-short|Nimmānarati}}) is the fifth heaven of the {{ill|six heavens of the desire realm|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|comment=no wikipedias work|lt=Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|qq=}} in the [[:en:Desire realm|Desire Realm]]. It is also referred to as '''Katen''' (化天), '''Kazirakuten''' (化自楽天), '''Kazizaiten''' (化自在天), or '''Rakuhenkaten''' (楽変化天){{refnest|name="大辞林_第三版"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E6.9E.97.20.E7.AC.AC.E4.B8.89.E7.89.88 "Kerakuten" - 大辞林 第三版]}}.

== Overview ==
Beings born in this heaven transform their sensory objects (五境) into realms of pleasure. The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

== Notes ==

Wikidata name: Nirmāṇarati
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Kerakuten''' (化楽天, {{lang-sa-short|Nirmāṇarati}}{{refnest|name="精選版_化楽天"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E7.B2.BE.E9.81.B8.E7.89.88.20.E6.97.A5.E6.9C.AC.E5.9B.BD.E8.AA.9E.E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E5.85.B8 "Kerakuten" - 精選版 日本国語大辞典], Shogakukan.}}, {{lang-pi-short|Nimmānarati}}) is the fifth heaven of the {{ill|six heavens of the desire realm|lt=six heavens of the desire realm|lt=Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|ja|六欲天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|qq=}} in the [[:en:Desire realm|Desire Realm]]. It is also referred to as '''Katen''' (化天), '''Kazirakuten''' (化自楽天), '''Kazizaiten''' (化自在天), or '''Rakuhenkaten''' (楽変化天){{refnest|name="大辞林_第三版"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E6.9E.97.20.E7.AC.AC.E4.B8.89.E7.89.88 "Kerakuten" - 大辞林 第三版]}}.

== Overview ==
Beings born in this heaven transform their sensory objects (五境) into realms of pleasure. The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

== Notes ==

The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

Wikidata name: Nirmāṇarati
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:09, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Kerakuten''' (化楽天, {{lang-sa-short|Nirmāṇarati}}{{refnest|name="精選版_化楽天"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E7.B2.BE.E9.81.B8.E7.89.88.20.E6.97.A5.E6.9C.AC.E5.9B.BD.E8.AA.9E.E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E5.85.B8 "Kerakuten" - 精選版 日本国語大辞典], Shogakukan.}}, {{lang-pi-short|Nimmānarati}}) is the fifth heaven of the {{ill|six heavens of the desire realm|lt=six heavens of the desire realm|lt=Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|ja|六欲天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|qq=}} in the [[:en:Desire realm|Desire Realm]]. It is also referred to as '''Katen''' (化天), '''Kazirakuten''' (化自楽天), '''Kazizaiten''' (化自在天), or '''Rakuhenkaten''' (楽変化天){{refnest|name="大辞林_第三版"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E6.9E.97.20.E7.AC.AC.E4.B8.89.E7.89.88 "Kerakuten" - 大辞林 第三版]}}.

== Overview ==
Beings born in this heaven transform their sensory objects (五境) into realms of pleasure. The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

== Notes ==

It is also referred to as '''Katen''' (化天), '''Kazirakuten''' (化自楽天), '''Kazizaiten''' (化自在天), or '''Rakuhenkaten''' (楽変化天){{refnest|name="大辞林_第三版"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E6.9E.97.20.E7.AC.AC.E4.B8.89.E7.89.88 "Kerakuten" - 大辞林 第三版]}}.
== Overview == Beings born in this heaven transform their sensory objects (五境) into realms of pleasure. The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.

'''Kerakuten''' (化楽天, {{lang-sa-short|Nirmāṇarati}}{{refnest|name="精選版_化楽天"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E7.B2.BE.E9.81.B8.E7.89.88.20.E6.97.A5.E6.9C.AC.E5.9B.BD.E8.AA.9E.E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E5.85.B8 "Kerakuten" - 精選版 日本国語大辞典], Shogakukan.}}, {{lang-pi-short|Nimmānarati}}) is the fifth heaven of the {{ill|six heavens of the desire realm|lt=six heavens of the desire realm|lt=Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|ja|六欲天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Six Heavens of the Desire Realm|qq=}} in the {{ill|Desire realm|en|Desire realm|WD=Q4447630|lt=Desire Realm|1=Desire realm}}. It is also referred to as '''Katen''' (化天), '''Kazirakuten''' (化自楽天), '''Kazizaiten''' (化自在天), or '''Rakuhenkaten''' (楽変化天){{refnest|name="大辞林_第三版"|[https://kotobank.jp/word/%E5%8C%96%E6%A5%BD%E5%A4%A9-491109#E5.A4.A7.E8.BE.9E.E6.9E.97.20.E7.AC.AC.E4.B8.89.E7.89.88 "Kerakuten" - 大辞林 第三版]}}.

== Overview ==
Beings born in this heaven transform their sensory objects (五境) into realms of pleasure. The celestial beings in this heaven are described as having a height of 2.5 ''ri'' (approximately 10 kilometers), constantly emitting light, and living for 8,000 celestial years, with one day and night in this realm equating to 800 human years. It is said that when males and females face each other and laugh, the purpose of sexual union is fulfilled. Offspring are born through spontaneous generation on the laps of the parents and are described as resembling 12-year-old human children in size{{Citation needed|date=2018th year 2月27日 (火) 08:11 (UTC)|title=}}.
